items.title: Handbook AI Workflow Automation
items.summary: Built for real operational workflows: complex processes with handoffs, follow-ups, evidence and SLAs that Handbook turns into guided execution with live dashboards and audit trails.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: Many operations rely on fragmented handoffs, approvals and evidence collection, which creates missed steps, SLA risk and poor visibility.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: As an AI Full-Stack Engineer, I work across Product Architecture & LLM Systems to model processes and turn them into guided execution with rules, reminders and escalation paths.

detailItems.label: Why it matters
detailItems.value: It demonstrates AI applied to real operations in manufacturing, banking and insurance with SLA visibility and complete auditability.

highlights: Real workflows: procurement, production, collections, document review and claims coordination.
Guided execution with live dashboards, evidence capture and end-to-end audit trails.
Operational metrics: cycle time, SLA compliance, on-time outcomes and rework reduction.

media.label: Video
media.title: Product demo
media.note: Functional demo of the main flow.

media.label: Website
media.title: handbookai.io
media.note: Guided execution platform for complex processes with handoffs, evidence, SLAs and audit trails.

items.title: LLM Support Automation at Nanti
items.summary: A full-stack conversational module built with Nest.js, Angular and the OpenAI API to operate real support flows through WhatsApp and tawk.io.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: Operational support needed faster responses and more automation without losing control or clarity around what the system was doing.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I designed and implemented the full-stack integration across Nest.js, Angular and OpenAI API, improving API consumption and frontend state management.

detailItems.label: Impact
detailItems.value: I automated 40% of support operations, improved frontend efficiency by 20% and increased backend resilience with robust error handling and type-safe architecture.

highlights: A strong case for showing production AI rather than prototypes.
Connects Nest.js, Angular and real operational channels clearly.
A good candidate for one short demo plus one or two supporting screenshots.

media.label: Website
media.title: nantisystem.com
media.note: Transport telematics company: fleet management, sensors, GPS, SIM M2M and technical support.

items.title: Data Pipelines for Analytics at Agora
items.summary: As a Full Stack & Data Engineer I delivered backend services, Python/Airflow ETL pipelines and frontend initiatives with measurable impact on speed, reliability and organic growth.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: Teams depend on reliable data and analytics, so the pipelines and services behind them cannot be fragile.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I designed a scalable Next.js + Tailwind component library, strengthened type-safe architecture with TypeScript + Redux, and maintained critical analytics pipelines.

detailItems.label: Results
detailItems.value: I reduced initial load time by 20%, cut production errors by 25%, increased organic traffic by 15% and ensured continuous analytics data availability.

highlights: Reduced initial load time by 20% through a scalable Next.js + Tailwind component library.
Cut production errors by 25% with TypeScript, Redux and type-safe architecture.
Increased organic traffic by 15% while keeping analytics available through Python and Airflow ETL.

media.label: Website
media.title: agora2030.org
media.note: Impact-focused organization supported by data-informed programs and digital product execution.

items.title: Secure Digital Voting System
items.summary: A digital voting platform built at Black Horse Technologies for the Mexican Association of Human Genetics, with stronger authentication, identity validation and anti-fraud controls.

detailItems.label: Problem
detailItems.value: The voting process required trustworthy digital participation with strong controls for authentication, identity and duplicate prevention.

detailItems.label: My role
detailItems.value: I built the flow with 2FA, camera validation, voter ID photo matching and logic to protect the process against fraud.

detailItems.label: Why it stands out
detailItems.value: Even if it is not the most modern stack, this case shows ownership, security thinking and the ability to solve a high-sensitivity real-world problem.

highlights: Excellent piece for demonstrating security thinking and identity validation.
Adds range to the portfolio because not everything revolves around AI.
Best presented with key flow screenshots rather than a long narrated demo.

experience.title: Real experience across AI systems, data pipelines and product software.
experience.description: Professional experience across product, backend, data and AI roles with a strong execution focus.

items.location: San Francisco, California, United States · Hybrid
items.summary: Product Architecture & LLM Systems to turn complex processes into guided execution with handoffs, follow-ups, evidence and SLA controls.

Designed and built a digital voting system for the Mexican Association of Human Genetics with 2FA, identity validation (camera + voter ID), anti-fraud controls, PHP implementation and cPanel deployment.

Reduced initial load time by 20% with a scalable Next.js + Tailwind library, cut production errors by 25% with type-safe architecture (TypeScript + Redux), increased organic traffic by 15%, and ensured analytics reliability with Python + Airflow ETL.

Automated 40% of operational support with a conversational system (OpenAI + Nest.js + Angular), improved frontend efficiency by 20%, and increased backend resilience through robust error handling and type-safe patterns.

Reduced complex form abandonment by 12% with optimized Next.js modules, implemented a scalable Node.js API handling 1000+ daily requests, and documented technical processes to improve maintainability and scalability.

process.title: From the real operational bottleneck to a system that can hold in production.
process.description: Identify the operational bottleneck, design a resilient system, and ship with measurable outcomes.

items.title: Find the real bottleneck
items.description: I start by isolating what is actually slowing the operation down, whether it lives in support, analytics, backend, UI or the handoff between teams and systems.

items.title: Design the system, not just the surface
items.description: The best solutions combine type-safe architecture, thoughtful product flows and integrations that can actually support real usage.

items.title: Ship with measurable impact
items.description: The goal is not only to release, but to leave behind a system that automates, reduces errors, improves performance and can be operated with confidence.

outcomes.title: Proven impact in support, stability, performance and conversion.
outcomes.description: Measured impact in automation, reliability, performance and product growth.

items.description: LLM-assisted workflows deployed in production through WhatsApp and tawk.io.

items.label: Performance
items.title: 20% faster initial load
items.description: Improved frontend delivery through scalable components and stronger UI architecture.

items.label: Growth
items.title: 15% more organic traffic
items.description: Driven by technical SEO improvements, stronger frontend structure and better product quality.
